#!/bin/bash

# Auto-generated package removal script
# This script will remove packages identified as unnecessary

# Dry-run: Show what would be removed
echo "The following packages will be removed: apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client red
is-tools strace tcpdump tree vim wget"
echo "Total space to be freed: 37114 KB (36.24 MB)"
echo ""
echo "To proceed, run: sudo apt-get remove -y {package_names}"

# Uncomment the line below to actually remove the packages
# sudo apt-get remove -y apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace tcpdu
mp tree vim wget
